titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Thomas Kennicut Beecher papers, 1844-1898.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by Marcie Farwell, November 2015

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Thomas Kennicut Beecher Papers,1844-1898.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2015 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Sermons, correspondence, notes, reviews, an article, certificate of chaplaincy and other mataterial belonging to F. Kennicutt Beecher and his family..

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Preacher in Elmira, New York, and New York National Guard chaplain.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Sermons, notes, reviews, an article about Jabberwocks,F. Kennicutt Beecher's phrenological chart, letter from "Sam'l L. Clemens" [not an original], certificate of chaplaincy; also, letters from Lyman Beecher containing advice and news on family matters, and from H. W. Beecher and M. A. Rockwood.

unittitle.extref: Link to a PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Thomas Kennicut Beecher papers, #96. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
